scenarios.name: Zero-downtime Deployment with secret env
scenarios.rationale: Both use RollingUpdate with maxUnavailable: 1, secretKeyRef and both probes, but only treatment adds preStop sleep, terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30, and resource requests/limits as recommended in the skill.

scenarios.name: Helm upgrade with preview and rollback
scenarios.rationale: Both invoke helm diff upgrade, helm upgrade --install with --set image.tag, and helm rollback; treatment matches the skill's exact flag set (-n app, --create-namespace, helm template debug) more completely.
